### Summary

* Added a new implementation kickoff task note for **SKO-186** at `.skogai/tasks/sko-186-go-go.md`, including context, proposed execution order, definition of ready, and implementation notes.
* Updated `.skogai/tasks/TASKS.md` to add **SKO-186: go go** under the **Active** section.
* Committed the changes with a conventional commit message:
  * `docs: add sko-186 implementation kickoff task note`
* Created a PR record via the `make_pr` tool with title:
  * `docs: add SKO-186 implementation kickoff task note`

**Testing**

* ✅ `git diff --check`
* ✅ `git status --short`
* ✅ `curl -i -s https://api.github.com/repos/SkogAI/claude/issues/53 | head -n 40` (confirmed synced GitHub issue context availability)
